content:
# 侧边栏布局

## 使用场景

管理系统的经典布局模式：左侧固定宽度的导航菜单 + 右侧自适应的内容区域。适用于后台管理系统、文档站点、设置页面等需要多级导航的场景。

## 布局结构

水平两栏：左侧侧边栏（固定宽度 220px，深色或白色背景）包含 Logo 和垂直菜单列表；右侧为主内容区域。侧边栏菜单项垂直排列，当前激活项有背景高亮。

## 节点树示例

```json
{
  "type": "group",
  "id": "sidebar-layout-root",
  "name": "侧边栏布局",
  "transform": {
    "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
    "size": { "width": 1200, "height": 720 },
    "rotation": 0,
    "opacity": 1
  },
  "zIndex": 0,
  "locked": false,
  "children": [
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "sidebar-bg",
      "name": "侧边栏背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
        "size": { "width": 220, "height": 720 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 0,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#001529" },
      "cornerRadius": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "sidebar-logo-text",
      "name": "侧边栏Logo文字",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 24, "y": 16 },
        "size": { "width": 172, "height": 32 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "管理后台",
      "style": { "fontSize": 20, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#ffffff", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "sidebar-menu-active-bg",
      "name": "激活菜单项背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 8, "y": 72 },
        "size": { "width": 204, "height": 40 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#1677FF" },
      "cornerRadius": 8
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "sidebar-menu-1",
      "name": "菜单项-仪表盘",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 24, "y": 82 },
        "size": { "width": 172, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 2,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "仪表盘",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#ffffff", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "sidebar-menu-2",
      "name": "菜单项-用户管理",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 24, "y": 128 },
        "size": { "width": 172, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "用户管理",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#ffffffb3", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "sidebar-menu-3",
      "name": "菜单项-订单列表",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 24, "y": 168 },
        "size": { "width": 172, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "订单列表",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#ffffffb3", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "sidebar-menu-4",
      "name": "菜单项-系统设置",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 24, "y": 208 },
        "size": { "width": 172, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "系统设置",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#ffffffb3", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "content-area-bg",
      "name": "内容区背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 220, "y": 0 },
        "size": { "width": 980, "height": 720 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 0,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#F5F5F5" },
      "cornerRadius": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "content-title",
      "name": "内容区标题",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 252, "y": 24 },
        "size": { "width": 300, "height": 32 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "仪表盘",
      "style": { "fontSize": 24, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    }
  ]
}
```

## 设计要点

- 侧边栏固定宽度 220px，使用深蓝色 #001529 背景（Ant Design Pro 风格）
- Logo/产品名在侧边栏顶部，白色文字 20px 加粗
- 菜单项高度 40px，间距 8px，激活项用主色 #1677FF 圆角背景
- 非激活菜单项使用半透明白色 #ffffffb3
- 右侧内容区使用浅灰背景 #F5F5F5 与侧边栏形成对比
- 内容区左边距 32px（距侧边栏右边缘）

metadata.description: 侧边栏布局：左侧菜单 + 右侧内容区
